revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 手力雄神社 |画像 = [[画像:Tajikarao Jinja in Nara.jpg|270px]]
手力雄神社 |所在地 = [[奈良県]][[奈良市]]橋本町39 |祭神 = 天手力雄命 |社格 = |創建 = |本殿 = |例祭 = |文化財 = |ISO = JP-29 |緯度度 = 34|緯度分 = 40|緯度秒 = 55.49 |経度度 =135|経度分 = 49|経度秒 = 45.72 |地図 = Japan Nara}} '''手力雄神社'''（たぢからおじんじゃ）は、[[奈良県]][[奈良市]]橋本町にある[[神社]]。[[三条通]]北側東端[[築地]]の上にあり、後方は築地塀を挟んで[[興福寺]]会館となる奈良市史編集審議会編『奈良市史 社寺編』、[[吉川弘文館]]、1985、p.179。 == 歴史 == 古くはこの地に楊柳の大木があったと伝わり、[[奈良坊目拙解]]には以下のように伝わっている同社境内掲示案内板。
有楊柳大木手力雄社内 枝葉繁茂而覆道路 謂手力雄柳 近世大風折損過半 今僅存株餘焉
[[1895年]]（[[明治]]28年）6月、三条通の拡幅時に、奥行き1間6分が切り縮められ道路に編入された。同年8月、石壇整備などを進め、社殿も少々移転した。 == 祭神 == * [[アメノタヂカラオ|天手力雄命]] == 出典 == {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == {{osm box|w|347524711}} *奈良市史編集審議会編『奈良市史 社寺編』、[[吉川弘文館]]、1985、p.179 *同社境内掲示案内板 {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たちからおしんしや}} [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:奈良市の歴史]]

{{神社 |名称 = 手力雄神社 |画像 = [[画像:Tajikarao Jinja in Nara.jpg|270px]]
手力雄神社 |所在地 = [[奈良県]][[奈良市]]橋本町39 |祭神 = 天手力雄命 |社格 = |創建 = |本殿 = |例祭 = |文化財 = |ISO = JP-29 |緯度度 = 34|緯度分 = 40|緯度秒 = 55.49 |経度度 =135|経度分 = 49|経度秒 = 45.72 |地図 = Japan Nara}} '''手力雄神社'''（たぢからおじんじゃ）は、[[奈良県]][[奈良市]]橋本町にある[[神社]]。[[三条通]]北側東端[[築地]]の上にあり、後方は築地塀を挟んで[[興福寺]]会館となる奈良市史編集審議会編『奈良市史 社寺編』、[[吉川弘文館]]、1985、p.179。 == 歴史 == 古くはこの地に楊柳の大木があったと伝わり、[[奈良坊目拙解]]には以下のように記されている同社境内掲示案内板。
有楊柳大木手力雄社内 枝葉繁茂而覆道路 謂手力雄柳 近世大風折損過半 今僅存株餘焉
[[1895年]]（[[明治]]28年）6月、三条通の拡幅時に、奥行き1間6分が切り縮められ道路に編入された。同年8月、石壇整備などを進め、社殿も少々移転した。 == 祭神 == * [[アメノタヂカラオ|天手力雄命]] == 出典 == {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == {{osm box|w|347524711}} *奈良市史編集審議会編『奈良市史 社寺編』、[[吉川弘文館]]、1985、p.179 *同社境内掲示案内板 {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たちからおしんしや}} [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:奈良市の歴史]]

{{神社 |名称 = 手力雄神社 |画像 = [[画像:Tajikarao Jinja in Nara.jpg|270px]]
手力雄神社 |所在地 = [[奈良県]][[奈良市]]橋本町39 |祭神 = 天手力雄命 |社格 = |創建 = |本殿 = |例祭 = |文化財 = |ISO = JP-29 |緯度度 = 34|緯度分 = 40|緯度秒 = 55.49 |経度度 =135|経度分 = 49|経度秒 = 45.72 |地図 = Japan Nara}} '''手力雄神社'''（たぢからおじんじゃ）は、[[奈良県]][[奈良市]]橋本町にある[[神社]]。[[春日大社]]境外末社。[[三条通]]北側東端[[築地]]の上にあり、後方は築地塀を挟んで[[興福寺]]会館となる奈良市史編集審議会編『奈良市史 社寺編』、[[吉川弘文館]]、1985、p.179。 == 歴史 == 古くはこの地に楊柳の大木があったと伝わり、[[奈良坊目拙解]]には以下のように記されている同社境内掲示案内板。
有楊柳大木手力雄社内 枝葉繁茂而覆道路 謂手力雄柳 近世大風折損過半 今僅存株餘焉
[[1895年]]（[[明治]]28年）6月、三条通の拡幅時に、奥行き1間6分が切り縮められ道路に編入された。同年8月、石壇整備などを進め、社殿も少々移転した。 == 祭神 == * [[アメノタヂカラオ|天手力雄命]] == 出典 == {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == {{osm box|w|347524711}} *奈良市史編集審議会編『奈良市史 社寺編』、[[吉川弘文館]]、1985、p.179 *同社境内掲示案内板 {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たちからおしんしや}} [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:奈良市の歴史]]

revision.text:
{{神社 | 名称 = 手力雄神社 | 画像 = [[画像:Tajikarao Jinja In Nara.JPG|270px]]
手力雄神社 | 所在地 = {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}{{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市}}橋本町39 | 祭神 = {{ill|Ame-no-Tajikarao|ja|天手力雄命}} | 社格 = | 創建 = | 本殿 = | 例祭 = | 文化資産 = | ISO = JP-29 | 緯度度 = 34| 緯度分 = 40| 緯度秒 = 55.49 | 経度度 = 135| 経度分 = 49| 経度秒 = 45.72 | 地図 = Nara city}} '''Tajikarao Shrine''' (手力雄神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}, at Hashimoto Town 39. It is an outer subordinate shrine of {{ill|Kasuga Taisha|ja|春日大社}}. The shrine is situated at the northern side of {{ill|Sanjo Street|ja|三条通}}'s eastern edge, on a raised embankment. To the rear, separated by a Tsukiji wall, lies the Kōfuku-ji Kaikan.Nara City History Editing Council, ''Nara City History: Shrines and Temples Edition'', {{ill|Yoshikawa Kōbunkan|ja|吉川学文館}}, 1985, p.179 == History == According to legend, this location once featured a large willow tree, as recorded in the ''Nara Bowmei Satsukai'' (Records of Nara Districts):Information board on the shrine grounds
There was a great willow tree within Tajikarao Shrine, Whose branches and leaves flourished, covering the road. Known as "Tajikarao Willow," In recent times, a strong wind damaged much of it, Leaving only a remnant stump.
In June 1895, during the widening of Sanjo Street, a depth of 1 ken and 6 sun was cut back, integrating it into the road. In August of the same year, improvements were made, including the construction of a stone platform and minor relocation of the shrine building. == Enshrined Deity == * {{ill|Ame-no-Tajikarao|ja|天手力雄命}} == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * Nara City History Editing Council, ''Nara City History: Shrines and Temples Edition'', {{ill|Yoshikawa Kōbunkan|ja|吉川学文館}}, 1985, p.179. * Information board on the shrine grounds. == Related Topics == {{osm box|w|347524711}} {{Commonscat}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Tajikarao Shrine}} [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:Kofuku-ji]] [[Category:Subordinate shrines]]

In August of the same year, improvements were made, including the construction of a stone platform and minor relocation of the shrine building. == deity == * {{ill|Ame-no-Tajikarao|ja|天手力雄命}} == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * Nara City History Editing Council, ''Nara City History: Shrines and Temples Edition'', {{ill|Yoshikawa Kōbunkan|ja|吉川学文館}}, 1985, p.179. * Information board on the shrine grounds. == See Also == {{osm box|w|347524711}} {{Commonscat}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Tajikarao Shrine}} [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:Kofuku-ji]] [[Category:Subordinate shrines]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)-qq]] [[Category:Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)]][[ja:%E6%89%8B%E5%8A%9B%E9%9B%84%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE (%E5%A5%88%E8%89%AF%E5%B8%82)]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)-qq]] [[Category:Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)]][[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:new pages]][[sn:Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)]][[Category:new pages]] [[sn:Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)]][[Category:qq]] [[sn:Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:&action=edit]]

手力雄神社 | address = {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}{{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市}}橋本町39 | 祭神 = {{ill|Ame-no-Tajikarao|ja|天手力雄命}} | 社格 = | 創建 = | 本殿 = | 例祭 = | 文化資産 = | ISO = JP-29 | 緯度度 = 34| 緯度分 = 40| 緯度秒 = 55.49 | 経度度 = 135| 経度分 = 49| 経度秒 = 45.72 | 地図 = Nara city}} '''Tajikarao Shrine''' (手力雄神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}, at Hashimoto Town 39. It is an outer subordinate shrine of {{ill|Kasuga Taisha|ja|春日大社|Kasuga-taisha}}. The shrine is situated at the northern side of {{ill|Sanjō Street|ja|三条通}}'s eastern edge, on a raised embankment. To the rear, separated by a Tsukiji wall, lies the Kōfuku-ji Kaikan.Nara City History Editing Council, ''Nara City History: Shrines and Temples Edition'', {{ill|Yoshikawa Kōbunkan|ja|吉川学文館}}, 1985, p.179 == History == According to legend, this location once featured a large willow tree, as recorded in the ''Nara Bowmei Satsukai'' (Records of Nara Districts):Information board on the shrine grounds
There was a great willow tree within Tajikarao Shrine, Whose branches and leaves flourished, covering the road. Known as "Tajikarao Willow," In recent times, a strong wind damaged much of it, Leaving only a remnant stump.
In June 1895, during the widening of Sanjo Street, a depth of 1 ken and 6 sun was cut back, integrating it into the road. In August of the same year, improvements were made, including the construction of a stone platform and minor relocation of the shrine building. == deity == * {{ill|Ame-no-Tajikarao|ja|天手力雄命}} == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * Nara City History Editing Council, ''Nara City History: Shrines and Temples Edition'', {{ill|Yoshikawa Kōbunkan|ja|吉川学文館}}, 1985, p.179. * Information board on the shrine grounds. == See Also == {{osm box|w|347524711}} {{Commonscat}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Tajikarao Shrine}} [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:Kofuku-ji]] [[Category:Subordinate shrines]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq deprecated close]] [[Category:Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)]][[ja:%E6%89%8B%E5%8A%9B%E9%9B%84%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE (%E5%A5%88%E8%89%AF%E5%B8%82)]] [[Category:qq deprecated close]] [[Category:Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)]][[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:new pages]][[sn:Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)]][[Category:new pages]] [[sn:Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)]][[Category:qq]] [[sn:Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:&action=edit]]

To the rear, separated by a Tsukiji wall, lies the Kōfuku-ji Kaikan.Nara City History Editing Council, ''Nara City History: Shrines and Temples Edition'', {{ill|Yoshikawa Kōbunkan|ja|吉川学文館}}, 1985, p.179 == History == According to legend, this location once featured a large willow tree, as recorded in the ''Nara Bowmei Satsukai'' (Records of Nara Districts):Information board on the shrine grounds
There was a great willow tree within Tajikarao Shrine, Whose branches and leaves flourished, covering the road. Known as "Tajikarao Willow," In recent times, a strong wind damaged much of it, Leaving only a remnant stump.
In June 1895, during the widening of Sanjo Street, a depth of 1 ken and 6 sun was cut back, integrating it into the road. In August of the same year, improvements were made, including the construction of a stone platform and minor relocation of the shrine building. == deity == * {{ill|Ame-no-Tajikarao|ja|天手力雄命}} == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * Nara City History Editing Council, ''Nara City History: Shrines and Temples Edition'', {{ill|Yoshikawa Kōbunkan|ja|吉川学文館}}, 1985, p.179. * Information board on the shrine grounds. == See Also == {{osm box|w|347524711}} {{Commonscat}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Tajikarao Shrine}} [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:Kofuku-ji]] [[Category:Subordinate shrines]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)]][[ja:%E6%89%8B%E5%8A%9B%E9%9B%84%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE (%E5%A5%88%E8%89%AF%E5%B8%82)]] [[Category:Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)]][[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:goodbye $1]][[sn:Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)]][[Category:goodbye $1]] [[sn:Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)]][[Category:qq]] [[sn:Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:&action=edit]]

In August of the same year, improvements were made, including the construction of a stone platform and minor relocation of the shrine building. == deity == * {{ill|Ame-no-Tajikarao|ja|天手力雄命}} == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * Nara City History Editing Council, ''Nara City History: Shrines and Temples Edition'', {{ill|Yoshikawa Kōbunkan|ja|吉川学文館}}, 1985, p.179. * Information board on the shrine grounds. == See Also == {{osm box|w|347524711}} {{Commonscat}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Tajikarao Shrine}} [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:Kofuku-ji]] [[Category:Subordinate shrines]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]][[Category: tier 5]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)]][[Category:11]] [[Category:Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)]][[ja:%E6%89%8B%E5%8A%9B%E9%9B%84%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE (%E5%A5%88%E8%89%AF%E5%B8%82)]] [[Category:Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)]][[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)]][[Category:11]] [[sn:Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)]][[sn:Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)]][[Category:11]][[sn:Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)]][[Category:11]][[sn:Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)]][[Category:11]] [[sn:Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)]][[Category:11]][[sn:Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)]][[Category:11]][[sn:Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)]][[Category:11]][[sn:Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)]][[Category:11]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:&action=edit]] [[Category:New]]

There was a great willow tree within Tajikarao Shrine, Whose branches and leaves flourished, covering the road. Known as "Tajikarao Willow," In recent times, a strong wind damaged much of it, Leaving only a remnant stump.
In June 1895, during the widening of Sanjo Street, a depth of 1 ken and 6 sun was cut back, integrating it into the road. In August of the same year, improvements were made, including the construction of a stone platform and minor relocation of the shrine building. == deity == * {{ill|Ame-no-Tajikarao|ja|天手力雄命|1=Ame-no-Tajikarao|12=draft}} == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * Nara City History Editing Council, ''Nara City History: Shrines and Temples Edition'', {{ill|Yoshikawa Kōbunkan|ja|吉川学文館|12=draft}}, 1985, p.179. * Information board on the shrine grounds. == See Also == {{osm box|w|347524711}} {{Commonscat}} {{shinto-stub}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:Kofuku-ji]] [[Category:Subordinate shrines]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] }} [[sn:Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)]] [[ja:%E6%89%8B%E5%8A%9B%E9%9B%84%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE (%E5%A5%88%E8%89%AF%E5%B8%82)]] [[ja:&action=edit]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Tajikarao Shrine}}

revision.comment: 10 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:手力雄神社 (奈良市) up to rev 97065763
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 手力雄神社 |画像 = [[画像:Tajikarao Jinja In Nara.JPG|270px]]
手力雄神社 |所在地 = [[奈良県]][[奈良市]]橋本町39 |祭神 = 天手力雄命 |社格 = |創建 = |本殿 = |例祭 = |文化財 = |ISO = JP-29 |緯度度 = 34|緯度分 = 40|緯度秒 = 55.49 |経度度 =135|経度分 = 49|経度秒 = 45.72 |地図 = Nara city}} '''手力雄神社'''（たぢからおじんじゃ）は、[[奈良県]][[奈良市]]橋本町にある[[神社]]。[[春日大社]]境外末社。[[三条通り|三条通]]北側東端[[築地]]の上にあり、後方は築地塀を挟んで[[興福寺]]会館となる奈良市史編集審議会編『奈良市史 社寺編』、[[吉川弘文館]]、1985、p.179。 == 歴史 == 古くはこの地に楊柳の大木があったと伝わり、[[村井古道#奈良坊目拙解|奈良坊目拙解]]には以下のように記されている同社境内掲示案内板。
有楊柳大木手力雄社内 枝葉繁茂而覆道路 謂手力雄柳 近世大風折損過半 今僅存株餘焉
[[1895年]]（[[明治]]28年）6月、三条通の拡幅時に、奥行き1間6分が切り縮められ道路に編入された。同年8月、石壇整備などを進め、社殿も少々移転した。 == 祭神 == * [[アメノタヂカラオ|天手力雄命]] == 出典 == {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == *奈良市史編集審議会編『奈良市史 社寺編』、[[吉川弘文館]]、1985、p.179 *同社境内掲示案内板 == 関連項目 == {{osm box|w|347524711}} {{Commonscat}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たちからおしんしや}} [[Category:奈良市の神社]] [[Category:摂末社]]

手力雄神社 | address = {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県|qq=draft|qq=draft}}{{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}橋本町39 | 祭神 = {{ill|Ame-no-Tajikarao|ja|天手力雄命|1=Ame-no-Tajikarao|qq=draft|qq=draft}} | 社格 = | 創建 = | 本殿 = | 例祭 = | 文化資産 = | ISO = JP-29 | 緯度度 = 34| 緯度分 = 40| 緯度秒 = 55.49 | 経度度 = 135| 経度分 = 49| 経度秒 = 45.72 | 地図 = Nara city}} '''Tajikarao Shrine''' (手力雄神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|qq=draft|qq=draft}} located in {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, at Hashimoto Town 39. It is an outer subordinate shrine of {{ill|Kasuga Taisha|ja|春日大社|1=Kasuga-taisha|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. The shrine is situated at the northern side of {{ill|Sanjō Street|ja|三条通|qq=draft|qq=draft}}'s eastern edge, on a raised embankment. To the rear, separated by a Tsukiji wall, lies the Kōfuku-ji Kaikan.Nara City History Editing Council, ''Nara City History: Shrines and Temples Edition'', {{ill|Yoshikawa Kōbunkan|ja|吉川学文館|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, 1985, p.179 == History == According to legend, this location once featured a large willow tree, as recorded in the ''Nara Bowmei Satsukai'' (Records of Nara Districts):Information board on the shrine grounds
There was a great willow tree within Tajikarao Shrine, Whose branches and leaves flourished, covering the road. Known as "Tajikarao Willow," In recent times, a strong wind damaged much of it, Leaving only a remnant stump.
In June 1895, during the widening of Sanjo Street, a depth of 1 ken and 6 sun was cut back, integrating it into the road. In August of the same year, improvements were made, including the construction of a stone platform and minor relocation of the shrine building. == deity == * {{ill|Ame-no-Tajikarao|ja|天手力雄命|1=Ame-no-Tajikarao|qq=draft|qq=draft}} == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * Nara City History Editing Council, ''Nara City History: Shrines and Temples Edition'', {{ill|Yoshikawa Kōbunkan|ja|吉川学文館|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, 1985, p.179. * Information board on the shrine grounds. == See Also == {{osm box|w|347524711}} {{Commonscat}} {{shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|手力雄神社 (奈良市)|version=97065763|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:Kofuku-ji]] [[Category:Subordinate shrines]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)]] [[Category:New]] }} [[sn:Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)]] [[ja:%E6%89%8B%E5%8A%9B%E9%9B%84%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE (%E5%A5%88%E8%89%AF%E5%B8%82)]] [[ja:&action=edit]]

To the rear, separated by a Tsukiji wall, lies the Kōfuku-ji Kaikan.Nara City History Editing Council, ''Nara City History: Shrines and Temples Edition'', {{ill|Yoshikawa Kōbunkan|ja|吉川学文館|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshikawa Kōbunkan|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, 1985, p.179 == History == According to legend, this location once featured a large willow tree, as recorded in the ''Nara Bowmei Satsukai'' (Records of Nara Districts):Information board on the shrine grounds
There was a great willow tree within Tajikarao Shrine, Whose branches and leaves flourished, covering the road. Known as "Tajikarao Willow," In recent times, a strong wind damaged much of it, Leaving only a remnant stump.
In June 1895, during the widening of Sanjo Street, a depth of 1 ken and 6 sun was cut back, integrating it into the road. In August of the same year, improvements were made, including the construction of a stone platform and minor relocation of the shrine building. == deity == * {{ill|Ame-no-Tajikarao|ja|天手力雄命|1=Ame-no-Tajikarao|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tajikarao|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tajikarao|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アメノタヂカラオ}} == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * Nara City History Editing Council, ''Nara City History: Shrines and Temples Edition'', {{ill|Yoshikawa Kōbunkan|ja|吉川学文館|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshikawa Kōbunkan|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, 1985, p.179. * Information board on the shrine grounds. == See Also == {{osm box|w|347524711}} {{Commonscat}} {{shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|手力雄神社 (奈良市)|version=97065763|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]] }} [[sn:Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)]] [[ja:%E6%89%8B%E5%8A%9B%E9%9B%84%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE (%E5%A5%88%E8%89%AF%E5%B8%82)]] [[ja:&action=edit]] [[Category:Shrines in Nara]] [[Category:Setsumatsusha]] {{Commons category|Tajikarao-Jinja (Nara)}} [[ja:手力雄神社 (奈良市)]]

手力雄神社 | address = [[:en:Nara Prefecture|Nara Prefecture]][[:en:Nara (city)|Nara City]]橋本町39 | 祭神 = {{ill|Ame-no-Tajikarao|ja|天手力雄命|1=Ame-no-Tajikarao|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tajikarao|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tajikarao|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アメノタヂカラオ}} | 社格 = | 創建 = | 本殿 = | 例祭 = | 文化資産 = | ISO = JP-29 | 緯度度 = 34| 緯度分 = 40| 緯度秒 = 55.49 | 経度度 = 135| 経度分 = 49| 経度秒 = 45.72 | 地図 = Nara city}} '''Tajikarao Shrine''' (手力雄神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Nara (city)|Nara City]], [[:en:Nara Prefecture|Nara Prefecture]], at Hashimoto Town 39. It is an outer subordinate shrine of [[:en:Kasuga-taisha|Kasuga-taisha]]. The shrine is situated at the northern side of [[:en:Sanjō Street|Sanjō Street]]'s eastern edge, on a raised embankment. To the rear, separated by a Tsukiji wall, lies the Kōfuku-ji Kaikan.Nara City History Editing Council, ''Nara City History: Shrines and Temples Edition'', {{ill|Yoshikawa Kōbunkan|ja|吉川学文館|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshikawa Kōbunkan|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, 1985, p.179 == History == According to legend, this location once featured a large willow tree, as recorded in the ''Nara Bowmei Satsukai'' (Records of Nara Districts):Information board on the shrine grounds
There was a great willow tree within Tajikarao Shrine, Whose branches and leaves flourished, covering the road. Known as "Tajikarao Willow," In recent times, a strong wind damaged much of it, Leaving only a remnant stump.
In June 1895, during the widening of Sanjo Street, a depth of 1 ken and 6 sun was cut back, integrating it into the road. In August of the same year, improvements were made, including the construction of a stone platform and minor relocation of the shrine building. == deity == * {{ill|Ame-no-Tajikarao|ja|天手力雄命|1=Ame-no-Tajikarao|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tajikarao|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tajikarao|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アメノタヂカラオ}} == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * Nara City History Editing Council, ''Nara City History: Shrines and Temples Edition'', {{ill|Yoshikawa Kōbunkan|ja|吉川学文館|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshikawa Kōbunkan|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, 1985, p.179. * Information board on the shrine grounds. == See Also == {{osm box|w|347524711}} {{Commonscat}} {{shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|手力雄神社 (奈良市)|version=97065763|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]] }} [[sn:Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)]] [[sn:E6%89%8B%E5%8A%9B%E9%9B%84%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE (%E5%A5%88%E8%89%AF%E5%B8%82)]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nara]] [[Category:Setsumatsusha]] {{Commons category|Tajikarao-Jinja (Nara)}} [[ja:手力雄神社 (奈良市)]] [[Category:Pages with no Wikidata]]

It is an outer subordinate shrine of [[:en:Kasuga-taisha|Kasuga-taisha]]. The shrine is situated at the northern side of [[:en:Sanjō Street|Sanjō Street]]'s eastern edge, on a raised embankment. To the rear, separated by a Tsukiji wall, lies the Kōfuku-ji Kaikan.Nara City History Editing Council, ''Nara City History: Shrines and Temples Edition'', {{ill|Yoshikawa Kōbunkan|ja|吉川学文館|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshikawa Kōbunkan|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, 1985, p.179 == History == According to legend, this location once featured a large willow tree, as recorded in the ''Nara Bowmei Satsukai'' (Records of Nara Districts):Information board on the shrine grounds

In June 1895, during the widening of Sanjo Street, a depth of 1 ken and 6 sun was cut back, integrating it into the road. In August of the same year, improvements were made, including the construction of a stone platform and minor relocation of the shrine building. == deity == * {{ill|Ame-no-Tajikarao|ja|天手力雄命|1=Ame-no-Tajikarao|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tajikarao|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tajikarao|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アメノタヂカラオ|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q849412}} == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * Nara City History Editing Council, ''Nara City History: Shrines and Temples Edition'', {{ill|Yoshikawa Kōbunkan|ja|吉川学文館|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshikawa Kōbunkan|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, 1985, p.179. * Information board on the shrine grounds. == See Also == {{osm box|w|347524711}} {{Commonscat}} {{shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|手力雄神社 (奈良市)|version=97065763|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]] }} [[sn:Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)]] [[sn:E6%89%8B%E5%8A%9B%E9%9B%84%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE (%E5%A5%88%E8%89%AF%E5%B8%82)]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nara]] [[Category:Setsumatsusha]] [[en:Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)]] {{Commons category|Tajikarao-Jinja (Nara)}} [[ja:手力雄神社 (奈良市)]]

手力雄神社 | address = [[:en:Nara Prefecture|Nara Prefecture]][[:en:Nara (city)|Nara City]]橋本町39 | 祭神 = {{ill|Ame-no-Tajikarao|ja|天手力雄命|1=Ame-no-Tajikarao|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tajikarao|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tajikarao|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アメノタヂカラオ|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q849412}} | 社格 = | 創建 = | 本殿 = | 例祭 = | 文化資産 = | ISO = JP-29 | 緯度度 = 34| 緯度分 = 40| 緯度秒 = 55.49 | 経度度 = 135| 経度分 = 49| 経度秒 = 45.72 | 地図 = Nara city| location = {{ill|Nara|WD=Q169134}} | coordinates = {{Coord|34.6821|N|135.82937|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} }} '''Tajikarao Shrine''' (手力雄神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Nara (city)|Nara City]], [[:en:Nara Prefecture|Nara Prefecture]], at Hashimoto Town 39. It is an outer subordinate shrine of [[:en:Kasuga-taisha|Kasuga-taisha]]. The shrine is situated at the northern side of [[:en:Sanjō Street|Sanjō Street]]'s eastern edge, on a raised embankment. To the rear, separated by a Tsukiji wall, lies the Kōfuku-ji Kaikan.Nara City History Editing Council, ''Nara City History: Shrines and Temples Edition'', {{ill|Yoshikawa Kōbunkan|ja|吉川学文館|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshikawa Kōbunkan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, 1985, p.179 == History == According to legend, this location once featured a large willow tree, as recorded in the ''Nara Bowmei Satsukai'' (Records of Nara Districts):Information board on the shrine grounds
There was a great willow tree within Tajikarao Shrine, Whose branches and leaves flourished, covering the road. Known as "Tajikarao Willow," In recent times, a strong wind damaged much of it, Leaving only a remnant stump.
In June 1895, during the widening of Sanjo Street, a depth of 1 ken and 6 sun was cut back, integrating it into the road. In August of the same year, improvements were made, including the construction of a stone platform and minor relocation of the shrine building. == deity == * {{ill|Ame-no-Tajikarao|ja|天手力雄命|1=Ame-no-Tajikarao|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tajikarao|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tajikarao|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アメノタヂカラオ|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q849412}} == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * Nara City History Editing Council, ''Nara City History: Shrines and Temples Edition'', {{ill|Yoshikawa Kōbunkan|ja|吉川学文館|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshikawa Kōbunkan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, 1985, p.179. * Information board on the shrine grounds. == See Also == {{osm box|w|347524711}} {{Commonscat}} {{shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|手力雄神社 (奈良市)|version=97065763|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{Commons category|Tajikarao-Jinja (Nara)}} [[ja:手力雄神社 (奈良市)]] {{wikidata link|Q22119325}} [[Category:Completion tier 5]] [[Category:Has wikidata]] [[Category:Setsumatsusha]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nara]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]

It is an outer subordinate shrine of {{ill|Kasuga-taisha|en|Kasuga-taisha|WD=Q714559|lt=Kasuga-taisha}}. The shrine is situated at the northern side of {{ill|Sanjō Street|en|Sanjō Street|WD=Q11355860|lt=Sanjō Street}}'s eastern edge, on a raised embankment. To the rear, separated by a Tsukiji wall, lies the Kōfuku-ji Kaikan.Nara City History Editing Council, ''Nara City History: Shrines and Temples Edition'', {{ill|Yoshikawa Kōbunkan|ja|吉川学文館|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshikawa Kōbunkan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, 1985, p.179 == History == According to legend, this location once featured a large willow tree, as recorded in the ''Nara Bowmei Satsukai'' (Records of Nara Districts):Information board on the shrine grounds
There was a great willow tree within Tajikarao Shrine, Whose branches and leaves flourished, covering the road. Known as "Tajikarao Willow," In recent times, a strong wind damaged much of it, Leaving only a remnant stump.
In June 1895, during the widening of Sanjo Street, a depth of 1 ken and 6 sun was cut back, integrating it into the road. In August of the same year, improvements were made, including the construction of a stone platform and minor relocation of the shrine building. == deity == * {{ill|Ame-no-Tajikarao|ja|天手力雄命|1=Ame-no-Tajikarao|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tajikarao|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tajikarao|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アメノタヂカラオ|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q849412}} == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * Nara City History Editing Council, ''Nara City History: Shrines and Temples Edition'', {{ill|Yoshikawa Kōbunkan|ja|吉川学文館|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshikawa Kōbunkan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, 1985, p.179. * Information board on the shrine grounds. == See Also == {{osm box|w|347524711}} {{Commonscat}} {{shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|手力雄神社 (奈良市)|version=97065763|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{Commons category|Tajikarao-Jinja (Nara)}} [[ja:手力雄神社 (奈良市)]] {{wikidata link|Q22119325}} [[Category:Completion tier 5]] [[Category:Setsumatsusha]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nara]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Pages with unclosed square brackets]]

手力雄神社 | address = {{ill|Nara Prefecture|en|Nara Prefecture|WD=Q131287|lt=Nara Prefecture|1=Nara Prefecture}}{{ill|Nara (city)|en|Nara (city)|WD=Q169134|lt=Nara City|1=Nara (city)}}橋本町39 | 祭神 = {{ill|Ame-no-Tajikarao|ja|天手力雄命|1=Ame-no-Tajikarao|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tajikarao|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tajikarao|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アメノタヂカラオ|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q849412}} | 社格 = | 創建 = | 本殿 = | 例祭 = | 文化資産 = | ISO = JP-29 | 緯度度 = 34| 緯度分 = 40| 緯度秒 = 55.49 | 経度度 = 135| 経度分 = 49| 経度秒 = 45.72 | 地図 = Nara city| location = {{ill|Nara|WD=Q169134|1=Nara (city)}} | coordinates = {{Coord|34.6821|N|135.82937|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} }} '''Tajikarao Shrine''' (手力雄神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|Nara (city)|en|Nara (city)|WD=Q169134|lt=Nara City|1=Nara (city)}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|en|Nara Prefecture|WD=Q131287|lt=Nara Prefecture|1=Nara Prefecture}}, at Hashimoto Town 39. It is an outer subordinate shrine of {{ill|Kasuga-taisha|en|Kasuga-taisha|WD=Q714559|lt=Kasuga-taisha|1=Kasuga-taisha}}. The shrine is situated at the northern side of {{ill|Sanjō Street|en|Sanjō Street|WD=Q11355860|lt=Sanjō Street|1=Sanjō Street}}'s eastern edge, on a raised embankment. To the rear, separated by a Tsukiji wall, lies the Kōfuku-ji Kaikan.Nara City History Editing Council, ''Nara City History: Shrines and Temples Edition'', {{ill|Yoshikawa Kōbunkan|ja|吉川学文館|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshikawa Kōbunkan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, 1985, p.179 == History == According to legend, this location once featured a large willow tree, as recorded in the ''Nara Bowmei Satsukai'' (Records of Nara Districts):Information board on the shrine grounds
There was a great willow tree within Tajikarao Shrine, Whose branches and leaves flourished, covering the road. Known as "Tajikarao Willow," In recent times, a strong wind damaged much of it, Leaving only a remnant stump.
In June 1895, during the widening of Sanjo Street, a depth of 1 ken and 6 sun was cut back, integrating it into the road. In August of the same year, improvements were made, including the construction of a stone platform and minor relocation of the shrine building. == deity == * {{ill|Ame-no-Tajikarao|ja|天手力雄命|1=Ame-no-Tajikarao|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tajikarao|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tajikarao|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アメノタヂカラオ|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q849412}} == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * Nara City History Editing Council, ''Nara City History: Shrines and Temples Edition'', {{ill|Yoshikawa Kōbunkan|ja|吉川学文館|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshikawa Kōbunkan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, 1985, p.179. * Information board on the shrine grounds. == See Also == {{osm box|w|347524711}} {{Commonscat}} {{shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|手力雄神社 (奈良市)|version=97065763|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{Commons category|Tajikarao-Jinja (Nara)}} [[ja:手力雄神社 (奈良市)]] {{wikidata link|Q22119325}} [[Category:Setsumatsusha]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nara]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Pages with unclosed square brackets]] [[Category:pages]]
